section.heading: Alternative imprisonment maximum for certain offenses
section.chapeau: Notwithstanding any other provision of this title, the maximum term of imprisonment that may be imposed for an offense under this chapter (other than an offense under section 1545)—

paragraph.content: if committed to facilitate a drug trafficking crime (as defined in 929(a)) is 15 years; and
if committed to facilitate an act of international terrorism (as defined in section 2331) is 20 years.
